title: audit — field classification
description: Audit rows are the ULTIMATE PII sink — they contain snapshots of every restricted field value ever changed. KMS encryption + strict access control + meta-audit on view-restricted use.

audit_log: Audit rows are themselves the audit_log — recursive by definition

notes: old_values + new_values are RESTRICTED at the row level. Within them, individual fields inherit the source model's classification. Fields listed in the source model's $auditEncrypted array get additional KMS envelope encryption. Fields listed in $auditExclude never land in old/new values.
ip_address is truncated to /24 (IPv4) or /48 (IPv6) at write time — sufficient for tracing without pinpointing individual devices.
user_agent may reveal browser + OS fingerprint. Confidential.
cold_key is internal — hidden from API responses via x-eloquent.hidden. Reveals S3 key layout; not a secret but not intended for tenant visibility.
